Package index

All functions

is_an() is.an() as_an() as.an()
Affiliation network structure
bitriad-package bitriad
bitriad: Triadic analysis of affiliation networks
chicago1960s
Corporate interlocks among directors in Chicago.
index_subset() subset_index() subset_partition() partition_subset() index_partition() partition_index() indexSubset() indexPartition() subsetIndex() subsetPartition() partitionIndex() partitionSubset()
Combinatorial bijections for affiliation network triad indexing
dualize() dual_an() dual.an()
Take the dual of an affiliation network
is_dynamic_an() is.dyn() as_dynamic_an()
Dynamic affiliation network structure
dynamic_triad_closure() dynamic_triad_closure_an() dynamic_transitivity_an() dyn.transitivity.an() dynamic_triad_closure_projection()

dynamic_wedges()
Wedge censuses and closure indicators for dynamic affiliation networks
minneapolis1970s
Interlocks among corporate philanthropists in Minneapolis-St. Paul.
add_modes() add_actors() add_events()
Add actor and event nodes
actor_count() event_count() actor.count() event.count()
Count the actors and events in an affiliation network
mode_projection() actor_projection() event_projection() actor.projection() event.projection()
Project an affiliation network onto its actors
V1() V2() set_actor_attr() set_event_attr() `V1<-`() `V2<-`()

prettify_an() prettify.an()

schedule()

whigs
